values.title: State-of-the-Art Equipment
values.description: Over 200 pieces of premium strength and cardio equipment maintained daily.

values.title: Expert Trainers
values.description: Certified personal trainers specializing in strength, HIIT, mobility, and sport conditioning.

values.title: 50+ Weekly Classes
values.description: From spin and boxing to yoga and Pilates, group fitness for every level.

values.title: Recovery Zone
values.description: Saunas, cold plunge pools, stretching zones, and massage therapy.

values.title: 24/7 Access
values.description: Round-the-clock keycard access for all members, every day of the year.

values.title: Community Events
values.description: Monthly fitness challenges, member socials, and charity events.

values.title: IronFit Gym
values.hero_description: Premium fitness facility with world-class equipment, expert trainers, and a supportive community.
values.cta_description: Start your journey today with a free trial week. No commitment, no pressure.

values.title: HIIT Blast
values.body:
High-intensity interval training that pushes your limits with alternating bursts of explosive cardio and strength exercises. Burn up to 800 calories per session.

What to Expect

45 minutes of kettlebell swings, box jumps, battle ropes, and bodyweight movements.

values.title: Power Spin
values.body:
Immersive indoor cycling with concert-quality sound, dynamic lighting, and motivating instructors. A full-body cardio experience.

Class Structure

Hill climbs, sprint intervals, and recovery rides set to curated playlists.

values.title: Strength Foundations
values.body:
Master the fundamentals of strength training with proper form and progressive overload. Perfect for beginners and experienced lifters refining technique.

Program Focus

Compound lifts: deadlifts, squats, bench press, and overhead press with expert coaching.

values.title: Boxing Fit
values.body:
Boxing-inspired fitness combining heavy bag work, pad drills, and conditioning circuits. Builds speed, power, coordination, and mental toughness.

No Experience Needed

Coaches break down every combination. Gloves and wraps provided.

values.title: Marcus Johnson
values.body: 12 years of competitive powerlifting and coaching experience. Specializes in building raw strength and confidence with evidence-based programming.

values.title: Sarah Kim
values.body: Former Division I track athlete who brings infectious energy to every session. Combines sport science with creative programming for challenging, fun workouts.

values.title: David Chen
values.body: Former amateur boxing champion combining traditional boxing technique with modern sports science. Specializes in mobility work and injury prevention.

values.title: Basic
values.body: Full access to gym floor, cardio zone, and free weight area during staffed hours.
values.includes:
• Gym floor access during staffed hours
  • Cardio and free weight zones
  • Locker room and showers
  • Free fitness assessment

values.title: Premium
values.body: Our most popular membership with 24/7 access, unlimited group classes, and exclusive perks.
values.includes:
• 24/7 keycard access
  • Unlimited group fitness classes
  • Recovery zone access
  • 2 personal training sessions/month
  • Guest passes (2/month)

values.title: Elite
values.body: The ultimate fitness experience with unlimited personal training, priority booking, and VIP amenities.
values.includes:
• Everything in Premium
  • Unlimited personal training
  • Priority class booking
  • Private locker
  • Monthly body composition analysis

values.title: About IronFit Gym
values.body:
Founded in 2015, IronFit Gym was built on a simple belief: everyone deserves access to world-class fitness facilities and expert guidance.

Our Mission

We empower our community through fitness with state-of-the-art equipment, certified trainers, and an inclusive culture.

Our Values

  • Excellence — Highest standards in equipment, cleanliness, and coaching
  • Community — Genuine connections and mutual support
  • Integrity — Honest, science-based fitness guidance
  • Accessibility — Every body, every level, every goal

values.title: FAQ
values.body:
What should I bring?

Comfortable workout clothes, athletic shoes, water bottle, and a towel.

Can I freeze my membership?

Yes, up to 3 months per year at no additional cost.

Do you offer discounts?

15% off for students and active-duty military with valid ID.

Operating hours?

Staffed: Mon-Fri 5AM-10PM, Sat 7AM-8PM, Sun 8AM-6PM. Premium/Elite: 24/7 keycard access.
